mapper.select:
SELECT ID, WORK_DATE, EQUIP_ID, EQUIP_NAME, RUN_TIME, WORK_TIME, FAULT_TIME, RUN_MILEAGE, WORK_TON, WORK_BOX, OIL_CONSUME, POWER_CONSUME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME FROM E_M_EQPT_OPERATION where 1=1
and EQUIP_NAME like #{equipNameLike}
and WORK_DATE >= to_date(#{startTime},'yyyy-MM-dd')
and WORK_DATE <= to_date(#{endTime},'yyyy-MM-dd')
order by CREATE_TIME DESC

SELECT ID, WORK_DATE, EQUIP_ID, EQUIP_NAME, RUN_TIME, WORK_TIME, FAULT_TIME, RUN_MILEAGE, WORK_TON, WORK_BOX, OIL_CONSUME, POWER_CONSUME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME FROM E_M_EQPT_OPERATION where ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into E_M_EQPT_OPERATION ( ID, WORK_DATE, EQUIP_ID, EQUIP_NAME, RUN_TIME, WORK_TIME, FAULT_TIME, RUN_MILEAGE, WORK_TON, WORK_BOX, OIL_CONSUME, POWER_CONSUME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) values ( #{id}, #{workDate}, #{equipId}, #{equipName}, #{runTime}, #{workTime}, #{faultTime}, #{runMileage}, #{workTon}, #{workBox}, #{oilConsume}, #{powerConsume}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now} )
mapper.update: update E_M_EQPT_OPERATION set WORK_DATE = #{workDate}, EQUIP_ID = #{equipId}, EQUIP_NAME = #{equipName}, RUN_TIME = #{runTime}, WORK_TIME = #{workTime}, FAULT_TIME = #{faultTime}, RUN_MILEAGE = #{runMileage}, WORK_TON = #{workTon}, WORK_BOX = #{workBox}, OIL_CONSUME = #{oilConsume}, POWER_CONSUME = #{powerConsume}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} where ID = #{id}
